title: TurnTraceEvent
description: Schema for a single turn event in a Mission Control session, designed for observability and debugging.

trace_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific trace event (e.g., a UUID).

session_id.description: Identifier for the parent session containing this turn.

turn_id.description: Monotonically increasing integer for the turn number within a session.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.

kind.description: The category of the event being traced.

actor.description: The component or bot that generated this event.

error_class.description: A structured error identifier based on the four main axes.

caused_by_trace_id.description: The trace_id of a preceding event that is the likely root cause of this one (e.g., a dependency_down event causing a provider_error). Resolved by the offline reader.
